response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned Staff-level generalist with real TypeScript depth, MCP server experience, and AWS CDK exposure — all directly relevant signals. However, the role's hard requirement of 8+ years delivering production AI solutions is unambiguously unmet: his AI work dates only to April 2025 at re:cinq. Python, the dominant language of the AI/ML ecosystem and an explicit requirement, does not appear anywhere in his skill set. There is no evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or enterprise customer-facing GenAI consulting, which are the core competencies the role is hiring for.
strengths: Direct hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and framework experience at re:cinq — a technology explicitly listed as a key requirement for this role
Proven Staff-level seniority across multiple companies, including mentoring, public workshop facilitation, and cross-domain technical leadership
Production AWS CDK and TypeScript experience with high-throughput, data-intensive workloads at Optilyz and Dunnhumby
concerns: Python is entirely absent from his listed skills despite being the primary language of the AI/ML ecosystem and an explicit role requirement
AI/GenAI experience is limited to roughly one year at re:cinq (April 2025–present), falling approximately seven years short of the stated minimum
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architecture design, LLM performance evaluation, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI), or enterprise GenAI consulting engagements
